doctors.name: Dr. Sarah Chen
doctors.bio: Dr. Sarah Chen is a board-certified Cardiac Surgery specialist at Mayo Clinic with 11 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Coronary Artery Disease, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Marcus Webb
doctors.bio: Dr. Marcus Webb is a board-certified Internal Medicine specialist at Johns Hopkins Hospital with 18 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Type 2 Diabetes and Rheumatoid Arthritis, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. Priya Nair
doctors.bio: Dr. Priya Nair is a board-certified Psychology specialist at Cleveland Clinic with 23 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Depression, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

doctors.name: Dr. James Harrison
doctors.bio: Dr. James Harrison is a board-certified Rheumatology specialist at Massachusetts General Hospital with 29 years of clinical experience. Their expertise spans Rheumatoid Arthritis and Lupus, and they are recognised for a compassionate, evidence-based approach to complex patient care.

experiences.raw_text: I was diagnosed with Type 2 Diabetes (Newly Diagnosed) about 14 months ago. My care team recommended SGLT2 Inhibitors, and the overall journey has been manageable with good support. During treatment I experienced hypoglycemia, vision_blurring, neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 522 days. I'm still navigating the day-to-day challenges but making slow progress.

I was diagnosed with Breast Cancer (Stage III) about 26 months ago. My care team recommended Surgery, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced neuropathy. My recovery took approximately 379 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Parkinson's Disease (Stage 3) about 18 months ago. My care team recommended Physical Therapy, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced falls, tremor. My recovery took approximately 1653 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Rheumatoid Arthritis (Moderate) about 30 months ago. My care team recommended Biologics, and the overall journey has been manageable with good support. During treatment I experienced morning_stiffness, anemia, joint_swelling. My recovery took approximately 530 days. I'm still navigating the day-to-day challenges but making slow progress.

I was diagnosed with Multiple Sclerosis (Secondary Progressive) about 6 months ago. My care team recommended Glatiramer Acetate, and the overall journey has been life-changing and ultimately rewarding. During treatment I experienced fatigue. My recovery took approximately 1015 days. I feel hopeful and grateful for the care I received.

I was diagnosed with Rheumatoid Arthritis (Severe) about 30 months ago.
